message.content: @startuml title "OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow\nwith SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning" participant "HealthCloud" as HC #green participant "Embedded Browser" as EB #green box "HealthSphere" #lightblue participant "Apigee Edge" as AE #gold participant "Orion Health Platform" as OHP #gold end box HC -> EB EB -> AE : GET /authorize?response_type=code AE --> EB : 302 https:// (SAML OR token) group SAML Authentication EB -> AE : POST /oauth2/saml AE -> OHP : POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current OHP -> OHP : Verify SAMLResponse OHP --> AE : Generate authorization code AE --> EB : 302 https://?code= end HC -> AE : POST /token?code= AE --> HC : 200 access_token + refresh_token @enduml
